changelog: Feature: Server-managed client mode — green/yellow banner shows whether client_set_settings is pushed from server; toggle locks all settings server-side
Feature: Browse client filesystem — click Browse next to backup path input to navigate the live client's directories and select folders
Feature: Apply default Windows exclusions button — one click adds junction points, temp files, Windows/ProgramFiles dirs to exclusion list
Fix: null values from UrBackup API no longer override defaults (e.g. client_set_settings=null no longer masks the server-managed default)
